name: Release GoodbyeDPI-Turkey v0.2.3rc3
body:
-Initial release for GoodbyeDPI-Turkey
-Added Superonline alt method
-Fixed Turkish character bug and added auto start for alternative method service installation
-Added alt method 2 and more detailed instructions for the batch files (Thanks to RockHanger)
-Fixed a naming issue
-Fixed auto starting for alternative method 2
-Added auto elevated permission request (Thanks to [kaya51](https://github.com/kaya51) and [scropoolISreal](https://github.com/scropoolISreal))
~~-Added starting of services after they get installed~~ (Reverted)
~~-Added user confirmation through CHOICE method~~ (Reverted)
-Rolled back to earlier version since asking for elevated privileges caused some problems for a small portion of users (Thanks to [Elecksy](https://github.com/Elecksy) for debugging)
-**Added 2 more alternative methods (**service_install_dnsredir_turkey_alternative3_superonline.cmd** and **service_install_dnsredir_turkey_alternative4_superonline.cmd**)** which have predefined DNS addresses
-Installed services are going to be started automatically even with the first set-up (You still need to restart your PC for alternative method 1 and 2)
-Fixed a bug caused by the ">" symbol in the command files which creates an unnecessary temporary file related to elevated privileges (Thanks to [Egezenn](https://github.com/Egezenn))
-Added missing alternative methods 3 and 4 as one-time runnable command files (There were only methods 1 and 2 for batch-running before) (Thanks to [berkyildizkaya](https://github.com/berkyildizkaya))
-Added alternative methods 5 and 6 (5 comes with predefined DNS address, 6 does not)
